dp.title: Fetch Error

records.powerchat_reason:
Product consists of blank wooden puzzle pieces (40mm squares) marketed as DIY craft/decoration items. Despite mentions of 'puzzles for toddlers' and 'babies' in bullet
points, the core product is a flat jigsaw puzzle with blank/empty pieces—excluded under STEP 1, EXCLUDED GROUP B (all jigsaw puzzles of any piece count). The age
range is listed as 'Adulte' (Adult), and the primary use case is interior decoration and creative DIY projects, not structured play. NOVA VISUAL AI confirms FP classification.
The product does not qualify as an educational puzzle for preschoolers (which would require explicit learning intent for shapes/letters/numbers) nor as a structured creative kit
with defined activities.
records.nova_reason:
The product consists of wooden jigsaw puzzle pieces without any indication of being a structured educational toy for preschoolers; it is classified as a flat jigsaw puzzle, which
is excluded under the rule.
